shorts.hook: The messy truth about doing it all
shorts.content: The messy, beautiful truth about doing it all is that you get to do it your own way. There's no single right way to manage multiple roles - you have permission to create your own path as a mother and entrepreneur.
shorts.title: Permission to do motherhood & business YOUR way

shorts.content: Intuitive leadership requires trusting your inner wisdom over external expectations in both business and parenting decisions. Your gut knows what's right for your family and your business.
shorts.title: Why intuitive leaders make better decisions

shorts.content: Heart-centered business approaches can lead to deeper connections with customers and more sustainable success. When you lead with authenticity, you create businesses that truly serve.
shorts.title: The secret to sustainable business success

shorts.content: Wellness practices like mindful morning routines can anchor busy mothers and business leaders throughout chaotic days. It's not about perfection - it's about creating moments of intention.
shorts.title: How morning routines save overwhelmed moms

titleOptions.curiosityGap: What happens when moms trust their intuition in business?
titleOptions.boldStatement: Intuitive leadership will transform your motherhood & business
titleOptions.numberBased: 5 ways intuitive leadership changes everything for moms

description:
Nikki Bostwick reveals how trusting your intuition can revolutionize your approach to leadership and motherhood.
From building The Fullest wellness brand to navigating the beautiful mess of doing it all your own way, this conversation is packed with permission-giving wisdom.

⏰ TIMESTAMPS:
00:00 Introduction to intuitive leadership
05:30 Building an authentic wellness brand
12:15 Balancing motherhood and entrepreneurship
18:45 Heart-centered business approaches
25:20 Permission to do it your own way
32:10 Wellness practices for busy moms
38:30 Creating supportive communities

✨ KEY TAKEAWAYS:
• Trust your inner wisdom over external expectations
• Build authentically by solving your own problems
• Balance isn't perfection - it's conscious choices
• Heart-centered approaches create deeper connections
• You have permission to do it your own way
• Morning routines anchor chaotic days
• Community creates powerful support systems

🔗 SUBSCRIBE: Hit that subscribe button for weekly leadership insights for ambitious women!

📝 FULL SHOW NOTES: https://themanageher.com/blog/nikki-bostwick-on-intuitive-leadership-saffron-lattes-conscious-motherhood
📊 TAKE THE QUIZ: https://themanageher.com/blog/nikki-bostwick-on-intuitive-leadership-saffron-lattes-conscious-motherhood

#IntuitiveLeadership #WomensLeadership #MomEntrepreneur #AuthenticBusiness #MotherhoodAndBusiness #HeartCenteredLeadership #WomenInBusiness #MomBoss #LeadershipPodcast #TheManageHer

communityPosts.content:
What's your biggest challenge as a mom in business? 🤔

A) Trusting my intuition over what "experts" say
B) Finding balance between family and work
C) Building authentic connections with customers
D) Making time for my own wellness practices

Just heard an incredible conversation with Nikki Bostwick about intuitive leadership that got me thinking about this! Drop a comment with your biggest insight about doing business and motherhood YOUR way 👇

"The messy, beautiful truth about doing it all is that you get to do it your own way." ✨

This quote from our latest episode hit me right in the heart. As ambitious women, we're constantly told there's a "right" way to balance motherhood and business.

But what if the secret is giving yourself permission to create your own path?

What would change for you if you truly believed you could do it YOUR way? 💭

pinnedComment: What resonated most with you from this conversation? 💭 Was it Nikki's insights on intuitive leadership, building authentic wellness brands, or finding your own way to balance it all? Drop your biggest takeaway below! ⬇️ And don't forget to grab the full show notes and take our quiz here: https://themanageher.com/blog/nikki-bostwick-on-intuitive-leadership-saffron-lattes-conscious-motherhood
